title: <div>And just put all the skillets together I've been developing for the past 15
content:
And just put all the skillets together I've been developing for the past 15+ years

D:
Well, I’m considering hiring someone to finish the mix and master of this EP. Would you want the job - could help you get back in the habit

A:
Absolutely!
100%
